title: Keralam: Congress Leaders Celebrate As UDF Heads Towards Return To Power After 10-year Drought
description: Speaking on early trends in Keralam, the CPI (M) General Secretary, MA Baby, expressed optimism about the reversal of trends as the counting will progress further later in the day. He stated that under the LDF regime, poverty has been eradicated from the state, meanwhile, it holds a top status in terms of education, healthcare, and social security measures
